AICARDMOD-PIETY_POWER.title: Piety
AICARDMOD-PIETY_POWER.description: Fully consumed when the Oracle is played. Higher stacks yield stronger effects.
AICARDMOD-PIETY_POWER.smartDescription: Fully consumed when the Oracle is played. Current: [blue]{Amount}[/blue] stacks.
AICARDMOD-DEVOTION_POWER.title: Devotion
AICARDMOD-DEVOTION_POWER.description: Gain Piety at the start of each turn.
AICARDMOD-DEVOTION_POWER.smartDescriptio: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Piety at the start of each turn.
AICARDMOD-DIVINE_LIGHT_POWER.title: Divine Light
AICARDMOD-DIVINE_LIGHT_POWER.description: Gain Block at the start of each turn.
AICARDMOD-DIVINE_LIGHT_POWER.smartDescri: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Block at the start of each turn.
AICARDMOD-PROPHET_EYE_POWER.title: Prophet's Eye
AICARDMOD-PROPHET_EYE_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, if Piety reaches the threshold, draw an extra card.
AICARDMOD-PROPHET_EYE_POWER.smartDescrip: If Piety >= [blue]{Amount}[/blue], draw 1 extra card at the start of each turn.
AICARDMOD-DIVINE_FAVOR_POWER.title: Divine Favor
AICARDMOD-DIVINE_FAVOR_POWER.description: Gain Piety at the start of each turn.
AICARDMOD-DIVINE_FAVOR_POWER.smartDescri: Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Piety at the start of each turn.
AICARDMOD-HOLY_RESONANCE_POWER.title: Holy Resonance
AICARDMOD-HOLY_RESONANCE_POWER.descripti: At the start of each turn, if Piety meets the threshold, gain 1 Strength.
AICARDMOD-HOLY_RESONANCE_POWER.smartDesc: If Piety >= [blue]{Amount}[/blue], gain 1 Strength at the start of each turn.
AICARDMOD-BLESSED_ARMOR_POWER.title: Blessed Armor
AICARDMOD-BLESSED_ARMOR_POWER.descriptio: At the start of each turn, gain Block equal to your Piety.
AICARDMOD-BLESSED_ARMOR_POWER.smartDescr: Gain (Piety + [blue]{Amount}[/blue]) Block at the start of each turn.
AICARDMOD-PROPHETIC_AURA_POWER.title: Prophetic Aura
AICARDMOD-PROPHETIC_AURA_POWER.descripti: At the start of each turn, apply Vulnerable to ALL enemies.
AICARDMOD-PROPHETIC_AURA_POWER.smartDesc: Apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Vulnerable to ALL enemies at the start of each turn.
